psychologicalTheme: Glacial crystal masons on a geological timescale. Dismissive-avoidant — prefers solitude over contact. Near-zero neuroticism and extraversion: effectively immune to emotional manipulation and never initiates contact. Type 5 (Investigator) — hoards knowledge and resources, minimises interaction. Highest conscientiousness in the galaxy. Under stress, becomes scattered and impulsive (Type 7 direction), which for a Pyrenth means making decisions in merely decades rather than centuries. Simple personality — only 3 subfacets because they lack emotional complexity.
